M-028.NAME: alembic-migrations
M-028.owns: database schema migration infrastructure and migration helper functions extracted from database.py

exports.fn-alembic-env: Async Alembic environment configured with SQLModel metadata
exports.fn-migration-helpers: Database migration utilities for schema introspection and data migration

M-028.hotspot: H-012: Alembic migrations must be backward compatible with existing SQLModel.create_all behavior during transition period
